text: Stepping through the threshold into this modern, angular space, I feel the sterility and structure almost pressing in. There's a sense of distance, an imposed order that both reassures and isolates. Seeing "R+D" boldly upon the wall reminds me how efforts at innovation and understanding are always undercut by the uncertainty of what lies beyond our current knowledge. I am curious but slightly unmoored, as if I have crossed into a realm where thought and action have not yet reconciled. It makes me feel prepared for novelty yet uncertain of my footing.
